articles.summary: More than 300 AMC locations in 89 markets across the U.S. will be programmed for live concert screenings. Tickets will range from $40 to $75.

articles.title: Spirit starts monthslong process of dismantling airline after biggest collapse in a generation
articles.summary: Spirit Airlines was back in bankruptcy court to start dismantling the airline.

articles.title: Anthropic CEO warns of cyber ‘moment of danger’ as AI exposes thousands of vulnerabilities
articles.summary: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei warned AI has created a narrow window for software firms, governments and banks to fix tens of thousands of vulnerabilities.

articles.title: Pfizer tops Wall Street estimates, reaffirms outlook as newer products show growth
articles.summary: Pfizer is looking to newer products and acquisitions to offset a declining Covid business.

articles.title: Ford’s secret EV unit emerges from shadows, still bullish on new pickup amid market slowdown
articles.summary: The "Universal Electric Vehicle" platform is expected to be key to Ford transforming its EV unit from billions of dollars in annual losses to breakeven by 2029.

articles.title: Ferrari tops Wall Street's first-quarter expectations ahead of EV debut
articles.summary: Ferrari NV on Tuesday beat Wall Street's first quarter earnings expectations and reconfirmed its guidance for the year.

articles.title: Major health insurers show signs of recovery – but a key test looms
articles.summary: Insurers have incomplete data on medical costs in the first quarter due to a lag in claims processing, which sets up the second quarter as the real test.

articles.title: Spirit Airlines CEO on carrier's collapse: 'We just kind of ran out of runway'
articles.summary: Spirit Airlines shut down before dawn on Saturday ending its run as the most famous U.S. discount airline.
